summary: Full backend + frontend smoke and integration testing for EMAY HUB. 16/16 backend pytest tests passed (auth, seed, dashboard, full CRUD across prospects/clients/projects/tasks/tickets/kb/team, kanban etapa PATCH, interactions, search, AI process creation with real Claude Sonnet 4.5 call, activities). Frontend: login page renders with EMAY branding & Google button, session cookie auth works, dashboard shows sidebar/topbar/search/KPI cards/charts, all 10 sidebar nav data-testids present, CRM Kanban shows all 8 etapa columns, Clientes list+detail tabs work, Proyectos/Tareas/Soporte/Conocimiento/Equipo/Procesos pages all expose their respective new-*-btn, global search returns dropdown results (Demo Corp SAC, Implementación CRM para Demo Corp).

minor.issue: Route declares `user: User = None` default kwarg but immediately overwrites — dead parameter; cosmetic, not functional.
Accepts `auth` query param fallback for Authorization; OK for embeds but ensure it isn't logged in URLs.

issues: Visible kanban columns only fit ~5 etapas before horizontal scroll on 1920px; ganado/perdido columns require scroll. Acceptable but could compress card width.

action_items: (Optional) Add data-testid attributes to modal form inputs (e.g., prospect-empresa-input, client-empresa-input) so that future automated form-submission tests can fill fields without relying on name attributes.
(Optional) Consider compressing CRM Kanban card widths so all 8 etapa columns fit without horizontal scroll on 1080p.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is ~880 lines and follows a repetitive pattern for each resource (GET/POST/PATCH/DELETE with identical auth boilerplate). Consider extracting a generic dependency for auth (FastAPI Depends(get_current_user)) instead of manually passing request/authorization/session_token to every route — would cut ~30% of code and improve readability.
log_activity is fire-and-forget but awaited inside hot path; if activities collection grows it could slow CRUD. Consider background task.
Mongo `_id` is correctly excluded everywhere with projection `{"_id": 0}` — good.
All env usage (MONGO_URL, DB_NAME, EMERGENT_LLM_KEY) reads from env without hardcoded fallbacks — good.
Seed endpoint short-circuits when any clients exist; idempotency works but it relies on a global count rather than per-entity checks (acceptable for demo).

success_rate.frontend: 100% on data-testid presence & navigation; AI procesos flow validated via backend Claude call.

test_credentials: Bearer test_session_001 / cookie session_token=test_session_001 — user admin@emay.com (already seeded in MongoDB).
seed_data_creation: Used existing /api/seed (idempotent). Demo Corp SAC client, Innova Tech SAC prospect, project, task, ticket, kb article, team member already present.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend regression suite at /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py covers all 7 CRUD resources + AI process + search + dashboard + auth + interactions + activities. AI process test calls real Claude Sonnet 4.5; expect ~5-10s. Frontend test relies on session_token cookie set via Playwright add_cookies (domain=emay-control.preview.emergentagent.com, secure, sameSite=None, httpOnly=False). All data-testid IDs from the request are implemented correctly. /procesos/:id chat interface and generate-doc-btn flow not exhaustively tested end-to-end via UI (only opener+message tested via API) due to 30-60s generation latency — main agent can validate manually if needed.
rca of the issue: No critical issues found. All requested features verified working.
